name: Enroute Inc Which Will Do Bus
registry_source: CA SOS bizfileonline.sos.ca.gov (not directly accessible via WebFetch CAPTCHA)
notes: No USDOT match in SAFER for 'Enroute' in CA/San Francisco; only matches were Enroute (Little Elm TX, USDOT 3751786), Porter-unrelated. The name pattern 'Which Will Do Bus' indicates a truncated DBA — this appears to be a CA general corporation whose full registered name is 'ENROUTE INC, WHICH WILL DO BUSINESS AS [DBA]'. Address 180 Beaver St # 6, San Francisco CA 94114 is a residential/small-office location (Castro district). Likely intrastate/private hire only; no FMCSA registration. SAFER 180 Beaver search returned no carriers. CA bizfile search blocked by CAPTCHA.

name: Porter Transportation
registry_source: Silver City Grant County Chamber of Commerce; Manta; Names & Numbers; NM SOS enterprise.sos.nm.gov
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record for Porter Transportation at Bayard NM. The three Porter Transportation/Transport entities found in SAFER are in Elk Grove CA (USDOT 2990205), Herriman UT (USDOT 2494930), and Maxton NC (USDOT 2443068) — none match Bayard NM. Bayard NM company established 1979, incorporated in New Mexico, ~2 employees, ~$130k annual revenue per Manta. Listed at 1400 Central Ave Bayard NM 88023, phones (575) 537-3313 / (575) 537-2865 / (800) 669-3312. Member of Silver City Grant County Chamber of Commerce (paired with Montoya Transportation). Categorized 'Buses Distributors & Manufacturers' / 'Trucking-Motor Freight'. Likely intrastate-only school/charter bus operator — no USDOT (likely intrastate).

name: G & K Bus Co Inc
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record for G & K Bus in MN under variants 'G & K Bus', 'G AND K BUS', 'G & K'. Address 23742 University Ave E, Bethel MN 55005 is in East Bethel (Anoka County); no public business listings found at that address. Anoka-Hennepin school district uses larger contractors (First Student, Kottke's, Northstar, Lorenz). No USDOT (likely intrastate small private school bus operator). MN SOS search via WebFetch returned system errors; could not confirm entity status. Likely a small intrastate-only operator with no FMCSA registration.

name: Quality Education Bus Co Inc
registry_source: NC SOS sosnc.gov (search blocked HTTP 403 via WebFetch)
notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under 'Quality Education Bus', 'Quality Education', 'Quality Bus', or 'Quality Ed'. Address 131 E Main St, Wallace NC 28466 is a downtown main-street address in Duplin County. Wallace area is served by Duplin County Schools (district-operated buses) and Wallace-Rose Hill HS. No daycare/private childcare operator identifiable at this address. NC SOS public search portal blocked by HTTP 403 for direct WebFetch. No USDOT (likely intrastate); likely a small private/childcare bus operator with no interstate operations.

name: B P & B M Sch Bus Trnsprtn Crp

notes: No FMCSA SAFER record under variants 'B P & B M', 'BP & BM', 'BPBM', 'B P & B M School Bus'. Address 53 Oak Ridge Dr W, Brockton MA 02301 is a residential street (also a stop on Brockton Public Schools Bus B23). Brockton Public Schools transportation is largely handled by larger contractors (MCJ Transportation at 21 Torrey St; One Call Transport). MA SOC corp database not directly accessible via WebFetch (system error). 'B P & B M' initials likely represent the owners' first names (e.g., Bridget Patricia & Brian Michael) of a husband-and-wife/family-run small school bus subcontractor. No USDOT (likely intrastate only); pure home-based small operator.
